description_long: This is a stylized doll with a pale complexion, light blue hair styled in a ponytail, and a soft, rounded face. The doll is dressed in an off-shoulder white dress adorned with pink floral patterns and a large pink bow at the chest, giving it a cute, playful appearance. The dress is complemented by pink thigh-high stockings, one of which is decorated with a bow, and matching pink shoes. The doll's pose is dynamic, with one leg bent and the other extended, and one hand resting on its hip while the other arm hangs loosely. The facial expression is gentle, with a slight smile and relaxed eyes, conveying a friendly demeanor. The overall design suggests a modern, anime-inspired fashion with pastel colors and decorative details.
description: A pastel-themed doll with light blue ponytail hair, a white floral dress with a large pink bow, pink stockings, and shoes, posed dynamically with a gentle smile.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's face, large pink bow, floral dress details, and both stockings clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the ponytail, the profile of the face, and the bent leg with visible shoe and bow.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the dress, the ponytail, and the overall silhouette of the doll.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the ponytail, the side of the face, and the bent leg with the shoe and stocking details.
attribute_clothing_style: Off-shoulder white dress with pink floral patterns and a large pink bow, paired with pink thigh-high stockings (one with a bow) and pink shoes, inspired by kawaii and anime fashion trends.
attribute_pose: Standing with one leg bent at the knee and lifted, the other leg straight; left hand on hip, right arm relaxed at side; head facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: Gentle smile with relaxed eyes and neutral eyebrows, conveying a friendly and calm demeanor.
attribute_hair_style: Medium-length, straight, light blue hair styled in a high ponytail with bangs framing the face.
